rows.published_wording: Neolithic to later Galician cattle sequence
rows.source_wording_excerpt: We sampled 18 cattle subfossils from different ages and different mountain caves in Galicia, of which 11 were subject to sequencing of the mitochondrial genome and phylogenetic analysis.
